description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style. The exterior is predominantly white with large glass windows and several outdoor terraces, some of which are furnished with seating and greenery. The house is surrounded by a few trees, providing a sense of privacy and integration with nature. The main entrance is set on a paved driveway, leading to a recessed doorway and a garage area. The structure features clean lines, open spaces, and a combination of concrete, glass, and wood materials. The overall design emphasizes openness, natural light, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, two-story white house with flat roofs, large glass windows, and multiple terraces, surrounded by trees and a paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, paved driveway, and several trees framing the house.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting upper terraces, rooftop features, and more trees on the side.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the rear terrace, large windows, and a clear view of the flat roof and outdoor spaces.
description_view_3: Side view with visible terraces, trees, and the house's layered, geometric structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a flat overhang, paved steps, and a garage integrated into the facade
